title: Senior Associate – Tax
metaDescription: Senior Associate – Tax role in Singapore: prepare and review tax computations and returns, advise on compliance, and liaise with IRAS.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for Senior Associates – Tax to join our Tax team in Singapore.
duties: Prepare and review corporate and individual tax computations and returns.
Advise clients on tax compliance and basic planning matters.
Liaise with IRAS on queries and submissions.
Review work prepared by tax associates.
Keep up to date with changes in tax legislation.
requirements: Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or an accredited tax qualification.
Good knowledge of corporate tax and GST.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
